mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, total_points, level, version, created_at, updated_at FROM points_account WHERE user_id = #{userId} FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO points_account (user_id, total_points, level, version) VALUES (#{userId}, #{totalPoints}, #{level}, #{version})
mapper.update: UPDATE points_account SET total_points = #{points}, level = #{level}, version = version + 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND version = #{version}
